title: Armenian POWs and civilian hostages held in Azerbaijan must be repatriated as soon as possible. Mirzoyan to the new Russian co-chair of the MG
content: Armenian POWs and civilian hostages held in Azerbaijan must be repatriated as soon as possible, said Armenian Foreign Minister Mirzoyan to the new Russian co-chair of the Minsk Group.

title: Mher Grigoryan received EEC Minister Sergey Glazev; discussed EAEU issues
content: Mher Grigoryan received EEC Minister Sergey Glazev, discussed EAEU economic cooperation issues.

title: Daily News Summary [12.03.2022]
content: Daily news summary covering events of March 12, 2022 in Armenia.

title: The "Fair Armenia" party issues an official statement on parliamentary elections
content: On June 27, 2021, the Central Electoral Commission of Armenia summed up the results of the snap parliamentary elections and made a decision on forming a National Assembly. The "Fair Armenia" party is only 4 months old, but the registered 4,000 votes show that a certain positive attitude has been formed towards the party.

title: Foreign Minister of Armenia Ararat Mirzoyan received the Secretary General of BSEC Lazar Comanescu
content: Foreign Minister of Armenia Ararat Mirzoyan received the Secretary General of the Organization of the Black Sea Economic Cooperation Lazar Comanescu. Mirzoyan stressed the importance of expanding sectoral cooperation with the BSEC, emphasizing that it will contribute to the implementation of the Government's programs aimed at ensuring sustainable economic growth through regional economic inclusive cooperation.

title: 20 families from Aghavno and Berdzor settle in Armenia's Syunik province
content: Residents of Berdzor, Aghavno, and Sus villages of Artsakh's Kashatagh region had until August 25 to leave their settlements as they came under Azerbaijan's control. 20 families from Berdzor and Aghavno expressed a wish to settle in Syunik province. Residents were taking out their last belongings.

title: The National Assembly accepted the resignation of the Defender of Human Rights
content: Armenian human rights defender Kristinne Grigoryan announced her resignation to the National Assembly on January 23.

title: Details regarding the request of the European Court to apply interim measures against Azerbaijan submitted by the RA government
content: Armenia submitted a request for an interim measure to the European Court, asking for an interim measure to be applied to Azerbaijan in order to eliminate violations of the rights of the civil population as a result of the blocking of the road passing through the Lachin Corridor.

title: Armenia proposes Iran-Black Sea corridor for Indian traders: The Economic Times
content: The proposed corridor will aim to connect Mumbai with Bandar Abbas in Iran and then Armenia and onward to Europe or Russia, bypassing Azerbaijan. Armenia has sought Indian investments for the corridor in the Armenian territory. Armenia's ties with India have witnessed an upswing in recent years buoyed by defense exports.

title: Pashinyan sent a congratulatory message to Zelensky on the New Year and Christmas holidays
content: Prime Minister Nikol Pashinyan sent a congratulatory message to the President of Ukraine, Volodymyr Zelensky, on the occasion of the New Year and Christmas holidays.

title: Stefano Tomat presented to Armen Grigoryan the works to be carried out by the EU mission in Armenia
content: On January 23, the EU Council reached an agreement on creating a European Union civilian mission in Armenia, which started its work on February 20, with about 100 people including about 50 unarmed observers. Stefano Tomat presented the planned works to Armen Grigoryan.

title: The territorial integrity of Azerbaijan has nothing to do with NKR and its status - Artsakh MFA statement
content: The Ministry of Foreign Affairs of the Republic of Artsakh announced that the official position of the people and authorities of Artsakh remains unchanged: Artsakh will not be part of Azerbaijan. The territorial integrity of Azerbaijan has nothing to do with NKR and its status.

title: Azerbaijanis dispute with Armenian youngsters in Getavan - Artsakh Police
content: A convoy with Azerbaijanis in civilian clothes stopped in the Getavan community of the Martakert region, after which they behaved rudely and provocatively towards Armenian youngsters, leading to a dispute and violence.

title: David Babayan claims the peace agreement cannot be at the cost of Artsakh
content: Artsakh Foreign Minister Davit Babayan stated that Artsakh cannot be the price of a peace treaty. He emphasized that the principle should be that Artsakh is not a part of Azerbaijan.

title: Referring to the Almaty declaration does not mean that there will be no opportunity to refer to the status of Artsakh - Aghajanyan
content: Referring to the Almaty declaration does not preclude opportunities to address the status of Artsakh, according to Aghajanyan.

title: Armenian cemeteries in all settlements of Hadrut are being demolished and destroyed and the gravestones are used as building material for roads. Human Rights Defender of Artsakh
content: The Human Rights Defender of Artsakh, Gegham Stepanyan, described occupied Hadrut as undeniable proof of Azerbaijan's policy of hatred and ethnic cleansing against Armenians. Armenian cemeteries in all settlements of Hadrut are being demolished and destroyed, and gravestones are used as building material for roads.

title: Kamo Vardanyan appointed Minister of Defense of the Republic of Artsakh
content: President Arayik Harutyunyan signed a decree appointing Kamo Vardanyan as the Minister of Defense of the Republic of Artsakh.

title: President Harutyunyan signed a decree on temporary restrictions on rights and freedoms in the state of martial law
content: Coverage of President Harutyunyan signing a decree on temporary restrictions on rights and freedoms under martial law, with responsibility for enforcement resting on the Artsakh Republic Ministry of Internal Affairs and the National Security Service.

title: Aspram Krpeyan, the daughter of the national hero of Artsakh Tatul Krpeyan, will become an MP of the "Hayastan" faction
content: Aspram Krpeyan, the daughter of the national hero of Artsakh Tatul Krpeyan, was set to become an MP from the "Armenia" (Hayastan) alliance.

title: Nikol Pashinyan spoke at the UN about the return of Armenian POWs, unblocking roads and establishing peace in the region
content: Prime Minister Nikol Pashinyan delivered a speech at the General Debate of the 76th Session of the UN General Assembly, addressing the return of Armenian POWs, unblocking roads, and establishing peace in the region.

title: Pashinyan congratulated Netanyahu on reappointment as Israel's Prime Minister
content: Nikol Pashinyan congratulated Benjamin Netanyahu on his reappointment as Prime Minister of Israel and the formation of a new government.

title: Firefighting operations at Masis city landfill suspended
content: Firefighting operations at the Masis city landfill have been suspended. Emergency rescue teams worked for nine consecutive days to extinguish the fire.

title: Criminal case of egg attack on Andranik Kocharyan and Sisak Gabrielyan sent to court
content: A criminal case involving hooliganism against parliamentarians Andranik Kocharyan and Sisak Gabrielyan (attacked with eggs) has been sent to Yerevan's court of general jurisdiction.

title: Serzh Sargsyan announces amnesty offer for supporters
content: Former President Serzh Sargsyan announced: 'We will announce amnesty for those who will stand by us in the trench of fighting against the state-destroying vermin from this moment on.'

title: Temperature in Lori, Tavush, Syunik and Artsakh to decrease by 8-10 degrees
content: Air temperature in Lori, Tavush, Syunik and Artsakh will decrease by 8-10 degrees during the daytime.

title: Archbishop Navasard Kchoyan summoned to RA Prosecutor General's office
content: Archbishop Navasard Kchoyan has been summoned to the RA Prosecutor General's office.

title: PM Pashinyan's address to the Armenian people: We must turn our mourning into fury
content: RA Prime Minister Nikol Pashinyan addressed the Armenian people with an appeal: 'We must turn our mourning into fury, our fears into determination, our doubts into action.'

title: Robert Kocharyan: PM's UN speech was a eulogy for the era of peace
content: Former President Robert Kocharyan stated that the Prime Minister's speech at the UN was 'a eulogy for the era of peace,' claiming a deep security crisis and that the authorities are unable to protect the country's territorial integrity.

title: It's unacceptable for us the more and more visible practice of the Russian peacekeeping troops to become a silent witness to the depopulation of Nagorno Karabakh - Pashinyan
content: During a Government session, Pashinyan mentioned providing additional 4 billion drams of support to Nagorno-Karabakh. He stated it is 'unacceptable for us that Russian peacekeeping troops become a silent witness to the depopulation of the Nagorno-Karabakh region.'

title: PM Pashinyan holds separate meetings with the heads of Sada and Service Titan companies
content: Pashinyan had separate meetings with Ara Mahdessian, President of Sada Company, and Hovig Safoian, one of the founders of Service Titan Company, which operate in the field of high technologies. Service Titan's Armenian office already had 200 employees and investments reaching $40 million.

title: Nikol Pashinyan meets with Maia Sandu - the sides highlight development of economic relations between Armenia and Moldova
content: Pashinyan met with President of Moldova Maia Sandu within the framework of the Eastern Partnership summit in Brussels. The sides highlighted the development of economic relations between Armenia and Moldova.

title: #armvote2021. Daily News Digest [05.06.2021]
content: The GALLUP International Association presented the current ratings of political parties and alliances, along with public opinion on snap elections.

title: The Prime Minister of Armenia met with the President of Slovenia
content: Within the framework of the 77th session of the UN General Assembly, Prime Minister Pashinyan held a bilateral meeting with the President of Slovenia, Borut Pahor.

title: Daily News Digest [29.10.2021]
content: MPs of the 'Armenia' (Hayastan) faction met with the Ambassador of Russia. Seyran Ohanyan reported on the meeting with Russian Ambassador Sergey Kopyrkin in Parliament.

title: Daily News Digest [22.11.2021]
content: Some streets were blocked in Yerevan for 44 minutes. A group of citizens blocked main roads and announced a rally on Republic Square.

title: #armvote2021. Daily News Digest [29.06.2021]
content: U.S. President Joe Biden congratulated the Armenian people and Acting Prime Minister Nikol Pashinyan on successful parliamentary elections.

title: RA senior officials pay tribute to the memory of the victims of the Sumgait pogrom
content: President Khachaturyan, along with PM Pashinyan and National Assembly President Alen Simonyan, visited the Tsitsernakaberd Memorial to pay tribute to the victims of the Sumgait pogrom, laying flowers at the khachkar.

title: Vahram Dumanyan appointed as an adviser to the President of Armenia
content: Vahram Dumanyan was appointed as an adviser to the President of Armenia. On December 12, 2022, Dumanyan submitted an application for dismissal from the position of minister. He was appointed to the ministerial position on November 23, 2020. Before that, he held the position of dean of the Faculty of Informatics and Applied Mathematics of YSU.

title: 800 people prosecuted in war-related criminal cases in Armenia - Prosecutor General
content: Investigations into criminal cases related to the 44-day war revealed that numerous military servicemembers and high-ranking officers failed to fulfill their duty properly, according to Prosecutor-General Artur Davtyan. 2150 criminal cases related to the war were investigated during 2021. As of yearend, criminal prosecution was carried out against 800 persons by these criminal cases, 55 persons have already been handed over to courts and respective verdicts delivered.

title: The talks about the Union state of Armenia with Russia and Belarus are premature - Narek Sukiasyan
content: Talks about Armenia joining a Union State with Russia and Belarus exist but are not on the top of the agenda, as integration between Armenia and Russia has many other platforms where it still has room to go further.

title: Snap parliamentary elections 2021: election campaign day 11. Updates
content: Coverage of election campaign day 11 for the 2021 snap parliamentary elections in Armenia. International observers of the CIS Inter-parliamentary assembly started their short-term monitoring.

title: Snap parliamentary elections 2021: election campaign day 4. Updates
content: Coverage of election campaign day 4 for the 2021 snap parliamentary elections. Meetings with representatives of 'Prosperous Armenia', 'Civil Contract', and 'Bright Armenia' parties' pre-election headquarters.

title: Financial means of MP candidates: Part Three ["I Have Honor" alliance]
content: Analysis of financial declarations of MP candidates from the 'I Have Honor' alliance, covering property, income, and interests of parties and MP candidates submitted to the Central Electoral Commission.

title: Opposition has no final decision yet over nominating candidate for President of Armenia
content: The Armenian opposition has not yet made a final decision regarding nominating a candidate for the position of President of Armenia.

title: USAID plans to allocate approximately $8.5 million for forcibly displaced people from NK
content: USAID is planning to allocate approximately $8.5 million for forcibly displaced people from Nagorno-Karabakh.

title: Suspicious pre-election donation transactions and finances of unknown origin in Civil Contract party
content: Investigation into suspicious pre-election donation transactions and finances of unknown origin in the Civil Contract party's election campaign.

title: The Black Sea has turned black: ecological disaster in the Black Sea
content: Coverage of an ecological disaster in the Black Sea region.

title: Missing data and errors in declarations of the head of the Prosecutor's Office illegal property confiscation department
content: Investigation into missing data and errors found in the financial declarations submitted by the head of the Prosecutor's Office illegal property confiscation department.

title: Kajaran municipality has made purchases worth more than 700 million drams from a company with the mayor's wife's participation
content: Investigation revealing that Kajaran municipality has made purchases worth more than 700 million drams from a company with the participation of the mayor's wife.

title: Anti-corruption court president's wife did not submit declarations; she says the reason is technical
content: The wife of the anti-corruption court president did not submit required financial declarations, citing technical reasons.

title: Free healthcare for Artsakh population in 2022
content: Healthcare for the population of Artsakh will be completely free in 2022.

title: SpaceX sent tourists to space for the first time; they returned safely
content: SpaceX sent tourists to space for the first time, and they returned safely to Earth.

title: Daily News Summary - March 29, 2022
content: No significant ceasefire violations were registered along the Artsakh line of contact, though the situation remained tense, with Azerbaijani troops remaining at bases in Karaglukh adjacent to Parukh.

title: Article on infocom.am (ID 148043)
Article on new.infocom.am (ID 89665)
Article on new.infocom.am (ID 94049)
Article on new.infocom.am (ID 84594)
Article on new.infocom.am (ID 69827)
Chief tax inspector of Armenia's State Revenue Committee arrested - Anti-Corruption Committee
content: The chief tax inspector of Armenia's State Revenue Committee was arrested, with other detentions reported, linked to the Anti-Corruption Committee.

title: 5165 party temporarily suspends activities and begins indefinite struggle
content: The '5165' party temporarily suspends its activities and begins an indefinite struggle.

title: Lavrov on returning NK to the negotiating table
content: Russian Foreign Minister Lavrov commented on bringing Nagorno-Karabakh back to the negotiating table. The negotiation participants should be determined by the parties themselves.

title: Vahagn Ohanyan appointed Secretary General of the Ministry of Emergency Situations
content: Vahagn Ohanyan was appointed as Secretary General of the Ministry of Emergency Situations of Armenia.

title: Total oversight of procurement processes requires 30 employees - Karen Mnatsakanyan
content: Total oversight of procurement processes requires 30 employees. The state cannot afford such a resource, according to Karen Mnatsakanyan.

title: Share changes at ZPMC carried out with the Prime Minister's direct knowledge - Vanetsyan
content: All share changes at ZPMC (South Caucasus Pipeline Company) were carried out with the Prime Minister's direct knowledge, according to Vanetsyan.
